title: FRÖLICHER SPECTRAL SEQUENCE AND HODGE STRUCTURES ON THE COHOMOLOGY OF COMPLEX PARALLELISABLE MANIFOLDS
publisher: Springer Science and Business Media LLC
abstract: AbstractFor complex parallelisable manifolds Γ\G, with G a solvable or semisimple complex Lie group, the Frölicher spectral sequence degenerates at the second page. In the solvable case, the de Rham cohomology carries a pure Hodge structure. In contrast, in the semisimple case, purity depends on the lattice, but there is always a direct summand of the de Rham cohomology which does carry a pure Hodge structure and is independent of the lattice.
